sections.paragraph:
Original: קרץ

Transliteration: qerats

Phonetic: ker-ats'

BDB Definition:

  1. piece
    1. denounce, slander, accuse maliciously, chew on (idiom)

Origin: corresponding to H7171 in the sense of a bit (to "eat the morsels of" any one, i.e. chew him up [fig] by slander)

TWOT entry: 2981

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
